profiles.source: Reviewed CmpHiveCachePopulateHiveEntryThread ntoskrnl 26200.8457 hive-cache worker thread flow through CmpInitializeThreadInfo, CmpOpenHiveFiles, CmpCreateHive, CmpHiveCacheEntryCleanup, and PsTerminateSystemThread; preview-only correction for the Hex-Rays privilege-set overlay on the private thread context.

parameters.source: CmpHiveCachePopulateHiveEntryThread consumes a private hive-cache worker context; Hex-Rays may overlay it as PPRIVILEGE_SET because the context begins with privilege-set-shaped fields

CmpHiveCachePopulateHiveEntryThread loads the hive-cache entry from the worker context and updates state, file context, copied hive name, created hive pointer, worker reference count, and completion flag
